case_title: SARAH M WAKIDA VS. THE BLUES COMPANY PARTNERS, L.P. A NEW YORK

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF WAKIDA, SARAH M AS TO DEFENDANT THE BLUES COMPANY PARTNERS, L.P. A NEW YORK LIMITED PARTNERSHIP JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WAKIDA, SARAH M RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE BLUES COMPANY PARTNERS, L.P. A NEW YORK LIMITED PARTNERSHIP $6,024.69 PRINCIPAL, $64.53 INTEREST, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,289.22, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

NOTICE OF ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT AS TO ASSIGNEE: LABOR COMMISSIONER OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA FILED BY PLAINTIFF WAKIDA, SARAH M AS TO DEFENDANT THE BLUES COMPANY PARTNERS, L.P. A NEW YORK LIMITED PARTNERSHIP
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO ASSIGNEE LABOR COMMISSIONER OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
